# Vertex AI Release Notes - Feature Announcements

## April 17, 2026 (NEW)
- **RAG Cross Corpus Retrieval (public preview)** — Enables simultaneous retrieval from multiple RAG corpora in a single query, allowing agents to pull grounding context across multiple knowledge bases
- **Claude Opus 4.7 in Model Garden** — Latest Anthropic model now available as managed API

## April 13-14, 2026
- **Visualization cells and SQL cells** now generally available in Colab Enterprise
- Metadata search for RAG Engine allows schema-based filtering during retrieval

## April 6, 2026
- **Metadata Search for RAG Engine**: Schema-based metadata filtering capability added to Vertex AI RAG Engine. Users can define metadata schemas for corpora, attach metadata to files, and filter contexts during retrieval operations.

## April 3, 2026
- **Vertex AI RAG Engine Serverless Mode**: Public preview of fully managed database for storing RAG resources that abstracts away database provisioning and scaling. Supports seamless transition between Serverless and Spanner deployment modes.

## April 2, 2026
- **Veo 3.1 Lite**: Released in public preview as the most cost-efficient Veo on Vertex AI model for video generation.
- **Gemini 2.5 Model Retirement Update**: Retirement dates for Gemini 2.5 Pro, Flash-Lite, and Flash postponed to October 16, 2026.

## March 30, 2026
- Vertex AI Workbench M140 release with Gemini CLI updates
- Workbench Image 26.03 introduces Debian 12, Python 3.12, Micromamba CLI

## March 25, 2026
- **Lyria 3 Audio Generation**: Two new models released for music synthesis - `lyria-3-pro-preview` (184 seconds) and `lyria-3-clip-preview` (30 seconds)

## March 24, 2026
- **Image Generation Endpoint Deprecations**: Multiple Imagen endpoints (versions 3.0 and 4.0) being discontinued June 30, 2026
- **Video Generation Endpoint Deprecations**: Veo 3.0 and 2.0 models deprecated

## March 16, 2026
- Vertex Explainable AI marked as deprecated

## March 12, 2026
- Partner model evaluation support for Anthropic and Llama models in Gen AI evaluation service

## March 5, 2026
- Vector Search 2.0 generally available with collections, auto-embeddings, and hybrid search capabilities

## March 3, 2026
- Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite released as most cost-efficient Gemini model

## February 26, 2026
- Gemini 3.1 Flash Image preview for improved image generation

## February 19, 2026
- Gemini 3.1 Pro preview with 1M token context window for complex reasoning tasks

## February 18, 2026
- Vertex AI Agent Engine Code Execution now generally available

## February 17, 2026
- Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 4.6 available in Model Garden

## February 10, 2026
- GLM 5 experimental launch for complex systems engineering and agentic tasks

## February 4, 2026
- Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.6 available in Model Garden

## January 23, 2026
- Virtual Try-On model promoted to GA with new `virtual-try-on-001` endpoint

## January 21, 2026
- Data Science Agent supporting BigFrames, BigQuery ML, and Apache Spark in Colab Enterprise

## January 20, 2026
- GLM 4.7 generally available as managed API in Model Garden

## January 16, 2026
- Gemini CLI available in preview for Vertex AI Workbench instances

## January 13, 2026
- Veo 3.1 preview supporting 9:16 aspect ratio and 1080p/4k upsampling

## January 6, 2026
- GLM 4.7 experimental launch for coding and complex reasoning tasks

## December 19, 2025
- Vertex AI Agent Builder Agent Designer low-code visual designer in preview
- FunctionGemma and T5Gemma 2 models available in Model Garden

## December 18, 2025
- Prompt sharing in Vertex AI Studio no longer requires admin enablement
- Cloud API Registry in preview for managing MCP servers and agent tools

## December 17, 2025
- Post-startup scripts generally available for Colab Enterprise
- Gemini 3 Flash in public preview for multimodal understanding

## December 16, 2025
- Vertex AI Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank generally available
- Vertex AI Agent Engine Runtime pricing reduction

## December 12, 2025
- Gemini 2.5 Flash with Live API Native Audio generally available
- Agent identity credentials secured by default with Context-Aware Access

## December 10, 2025
- DeepSeek-V3.2 available in Model Garden as managed API

## December 9, 2025
- Ministral 3 and Mistral Large 3 models available in Model Garden

## December 8, 2025
- Veo 3.1 video extension support in preview

## December 2, 2025
- Model Garden vLLM container for multi-replica and multi-model serving

## November 17, 2025
- Veo 3.1 generally available with fast variant
- LearnLM capabilities integrated into Gemini models

## November 13, 2025
- Kimi K2 Thinking available in Model Garden for complex problem-solving
- Updated prompt caching for Anthropic Claude models with one-hour TTL

## November 7, 2025
- Vertex AI Agent Engine observability features, playground, agent evaluation, and memory revisions in preview
- Express mode support and free tier for Vertex AI Agent Engine Runtime generally available

## November 4, 2025
- MiniMax M2 available in Model Garden for tool-calling tasks

## October 23, 2025
- DeepSeek-OCR, Qwen3-VL, and Earth AI models in Model Garden

## October 20, 2025
- Visualization cells in preview for Colab Enterprise
- Computer Use tool available in preview

## October 16, 2025
- Mistral's Codestral 2 available in Model Garden
- vLLM TPU through Model Garden
- Anthropic's Claude Haiku 4.5 available in Model Garden
- Veo 3.1 in preview
- Veo 2 object insertion/removal in preview

## Last Fetched
2026-04-23 — NEW: RAG Cross Corpus Retrieval in public preview, Claude Opus 4.7 in Model Garden (Apr 17, 2026); Visualization cells and SQL cells GA in Colab Enterprise (Apr 13-14, 2026).
